title: Dev Guild Regenerative Stack
dek: The Dev Guild Paragraph series gives the site a public story for PGSP, Squad Staking, Green Goods, GreenWill, Allo allocation tooling, and capital formation.
excerpt: A source-backed Dev Guild story connecting validator rewards, impact verification, reputation, allocation tools, and sustainable public-goods funding.
body:
The Greenpill Dev Guild's Paragraph series now gives the website a public source trail for the regenerative stack it has been describing across grants, tools, and builder updates.

The Public Goods Staking Protocol v0 article frames validator infrastructure, distributed validator technology, and vault routing as a way to create recurring funding for public goods. The earlier Squad Staking article provides the community-staking foundation, while the Capital Formation article connects that yield-bearing path to Green Goods and broader impact financing.

The same series also documents the application and social layers: Green Goods for visible and verifiable regenerative work, GreenWill for reputation and governance participation, and Allo-aligned allocation tools such as grant ships, conviction voting, streaming funds, and cookie jars.

For the website, this should read as one Dev Guild workstream story. Individual Paragraph posts belong in the Library and project proof links rather than becoming a scattered set of project pages.

## Sources

- S059: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/the-public-goods-staking-protocol-v0
- S060: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/pioneering-a-regenerative-stack
- S061: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/squad-staking-turning-validator-rewards-into-public-good
- S062: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/the-allo-alliance-innovating-capital-allocation-on-chain
- S063: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/greenwill-powering-governance-through-reputation-tracking
- S064: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/green-goods-simplifying-impact-capture-and-exchange
- S065: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/capital-formation-turning-impact-into-sustainable-revenue
- S066: https://paragraph.com/@greenpilldevguild/validating-the-regenerative-stack
author: Greenpill Network research
